title: Countable, Uncountable & Quantifiers
description: Tell countable nouns from uncountable ones and pick the right quantifier: some/any, much/many, a lot of, a few/a little, and how much/how many.
sources: CEFR A2 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Raymond Murphy, Essential Grammar in Use (countable & uncountable nouns; some/any; much/many/a lot of; a few/a little)
